com.sforce.soap.partner.PicklistEntry.label: Validating - Also the username will be changed
Error: The email it is already used

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: Insert in This Field the Job Title Description
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Job title
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: Job_title__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: This Allow the System to Send the Platform Credentials
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Main Contact
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: Main_Contact__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.calculatedFormula: Account.Subscription__c + TEXT(DAY( Account.Date_of_Birth__c )) & TEXT(MONTH( Account.Date_of_Birth__c )) & TEXT(YEAR( Account.Date_of_Birth__c ))
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: SEPA Direct Debit Identifier
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: SEPA_Direct_Debit_Identifier__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: Use this field unflagged (FALSE) to avoid the syncronization with Pardot
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Sync with Pardot
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: Sync_with_Pardot__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: work only when survey record type is correctly set up in Survey Monkey
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: CES Total Responses
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: CES_TotalResponses__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: Is accurate only when Survey record type is correctly set up in Survey Monkey
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: NPS Total Responses
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: NPS_TotalResponses__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.calculatedFormula: IF( Data_Quality_Score__c =100,"All Contact Details Captured", "Missing: "&IF( LEN( Phone ) = 0, "Phone, ","")&""&IF(LEN( Email) = 0, "Email, ","")&""&IF( LEN( MailingStreet ) = 0, "Complete Address, ","")&""&IF( LEN(Title) = 0, "Job Title, ","")&""&IF( ISPICKVAL( Salutation,""), "Salutation",""))
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Data Quality Description
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: Data_Quality_Description__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.calculatedFormula: IF( LEN( Phone) = 0, 0,20) + IF( LEN( Email) = 0, 0,20) + IF( LEN(MailingStreet) = 0, 0,20) + IF( LEN(Title) = 0, 0,20) + IF( ISPICKVAL(Salutation,""), 0,20)
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Data Quality Score
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: Data_Quality_Score__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: This flag is useful to enable(TRUE) or disable (FALSE) the feed item notifcation introduced with GIPN project
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Feed Item Notification
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: Feed_Item_Notification__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: Indicates a record used for Marketing Cloud testing
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Test SFMC
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: Test_SFMC__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: If true, indicates the contact has opted out of email messages.
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Has Opted Out of Email
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: Has_Opted_Out_of_Email__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: Information updated daily, not in real time
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Business Role
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: Business_Role__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.PicklistEntry.label: Service Operations Read Only (Video & MHz Connectivity)
com.sforce.soap.partner.PicklistEntry.value: Service Operations Read Only (Video & MHz Connectivity)

com.sforce.soap.partner.PicklistEntry.label: Service Operations Read Only Advance Services (Connectivity Mbps)
com.sforce.soap.partner.PicklistEntry.value: Service Operations Read Only Advance Services (Connectivity Mbps)
